name: S9: Metformin Repurposing — Baseline Characterization
description: Baseline covariate profile comparison between T2DM patients initiating metformin and those initiating insulin. Evaluates demographic, clinical, and pharmacological balance for the Metformin Repurposing study.

design_json.description: Baseline characterization comparing demographic, clinical, and pharmacological profiles of T2DM new metformin users vs T2DM new insulin users across demographics, conditions, drugs, measurements, procedures, and visits in the 365 days prior to index.
